description: DD1 12-partner federated MCP roster (2026-05-17). Wave 51 dim R 6-partner curated set is preserved at data/federated_partners.json (legacy contract); this file is the additive DD1 expansion that broadens agent discovery surfaces across billing / CRM / enterprise messaging / document management / MCP federation hubs / cross-promotion. 6 base partners (freee / github / linear / mf / notion / slack) are augmented by 6 expansion partners (aws_bedrock / claude_ai / google_drive / ms_teams / salesforce / stripe). Partners listed alphabetically by partner_id. Endpoints verified 2026-05-17. Do NOT add self-reference (jpcite / jpintel / autonomath) to this list — federation must be to peers only. NO aggregator MCP endpoints — first-party only.

partners.name: AWS Bedrock Agents
partners.use_when: Query needs to orchestrate or hand off to an AWS Bedrock managed agent (foundation-model-backed) — Bedrock owns the agent runtime, jpcite does not.

partners.name: Anthropic Claude.ai
partners.use_when: Query is about end-user Claude.ai workflows, MCP client wiring, or cross-promotion of jpcite to Claude.ai users — Anthropic owns the Claude.ai surface, jpcite does not.

partners.name: freee 会計
partners.use_when: Query needs the user's private accounting ledger, draft invoices, or 確定申告 working data — freee owns the user's books, jpcite does not.

partners.name: GitHub
partners.use_when: Query references source code, repositories, pull requests, issues, or CI workflows — GitHub hosts the canonical repo state, jpcite does not.

partners.name: Google Drive
partners.use_when: Query needs files, Google Sheets, or Google Docs stored in the user's Drive — Google Drive owns the file graph, jpcite does not.

partners.name: Linear
partners.use_when: Query needs product issues, cycles, projects, or roadmap items — Linear owns the team's product tracker, jpcite does not.

partners.name: マネーフォワード クラウド
partners.use_when: Query needs the user's private accounting ledger or 給与計算 data and the user is on MoneyForward Cloud — MF owns the user's books, jpcite does not.

partners.name: Microsoft Teams
partners.use_when: Query needs to read enterprise Teams chat, channel posts, or meeting metadata — Microsoft Teams owns the enterprise messaging state, jpcite does not.

partners.name: Notion
partners.use_when: Query needs internal documents, wiki pages, or knowledge-base entries — Notion owns the team's doc graph, jpcite does not.

partners.name: Salesforce
partners.use_when: Query needs CRM account / opportunity / lead state from Salesforce — Salesforce owns the CRM record graph, jpcite does not.

partners.name: Slack
partners.use_when: Query needs to read team chat history or send a notification message — Slack owns the team's chat state, jpcite does not.

partners.name: Stripe
partners.use_when: Query needs Stripe billing, payment, subscription, or invoice reconciliation data — Stripe owns the billing state, jpcite does not.
